scopingMetadata.discoverySource: tests/fixtures/example_scope.json (fictional Acme Corp — test fixture, not a real client)

workstreams.name: CRM Architecture & Setup
workstreams.description: Tier selection, portal config, user roles/permissions, team structure

workstreams.name: Pipeline & Deal Management
workstreams.description: Pipeline stages, deal properties, required fields, stage automation, probability mapping

workstreams.name: Contact & Company Management
workstreams.description: Standard + custom properties, lifecycle stages, lead status, association labels, dedup strategy
workstreams.notes: Custom property cap: 30; overages are change orders

workstreams.name: Automations & Workflows
workstreams.description: Lead routing, task creation, stage-change triggers, notification workflows, SLA enforcement

workstreams.name: Reporting & Dashboards
workstreams.description: Standard reports, custom reports, dashboards per role, KPI definitions

workstreams.name: Mailchimp Data Migration
workstreams.description: Export, cleanse, dedup, map, test load, validate (5K contacts)
workstreams.notes: Highest-risk item — spreadsheet/Mailchimp data quality unknown

workstreams.name: QuickBooks Integration
workstreams.description: API mapping, invoice sync logic, conflict resolution, error handling, monitoring

workstreams.name: Aircall Integration
workstreams.description: Call logging, click-to-call, contact sync, activity tracking

workstreams.name: Training (Admin + End-User)
workstreams.description: Admin training, end-user training by role, documentation, go-live support

workstreams.name: Project Management
workstreams.description: Kickoff, weekly syncs, status updates, change management (~10-15% of total)

deliverables.name: Configured HubSpot portal
deliverables.acceptanceCriteria: Admin can create a deal and it routes per the configured rules

deliverables.name: Migrated contact database
deliverables.acceptanceCriteria: Record count reconciles within 2% and zero duplicate emails remain

deliverables.name: QuickBooks invoice sync
deliverables.description: Bi-directional invoice sync with error monitoring
deliverables.acceptanceCriteria: Test invoice syncs both directions and errors surface to a monitored queue

deliverables.name: Aircall telephony integration
deliverables.description: Calls log to CRM with click-to-call
deliverables.acceptanceCriteria: Outbound call logs an activity on the correct contact

deliverables.name: Training + documentation
deliverables.acceptanceCriteria: Admin completes a config change unaided after training

risks.name: Data quality from spreadsheets (no validation, likely duplicates)
risks.impact: Migration slips; bad data erodes CRM trust at launch
risks.mitigation: Front-load a data audit in Phase 1; budget cleanse/dedup hours explicitly

risks.name: QuickBooks API limitations (rate limits, field restrictions)
risks.impact: Integration build runs long or requires workarounds
risks.mitigation: Validate API capabilities in a spike before committing sync scope

risks.name: 8-week timeline tight for 4 systems
risks.impact: Compressed schedule forces parallel work and raises risk
risks.mitigation: Phase the work; overlap Phases 1 and 2 by 2 weeks

risks.name: Mailchimp list health unknown (bounces, unsubscribes)
risks.impact: Deliverability and segment accuracy degraded post-migration

risks.name: Phone number porting timeline (carrier-dependent)
risks.mitigation: Start porting request at project kickoff, in parallel

risks.name: Adoption risk (moving from spreadsheets to CRM)
risks.impact: Users revert to spreadsheets; ROI not realized
risks.mitigation: Role-based training + go-live hypercare + exec sponsorship

assumptions: HubSpot Sales Hub Professional licensing is procured by the client before kickoff
Up to 30 custom properties; overages handled as change orders
Client provides a single point of contact with decision authority
exclusions: Marketing Hub configuration beyond list migration
Custom-coded integrations beyond QuickBooks and Aircall
Historical QuickBooks transaction migration (current-state sync only)
clientResponsibilities: Provide Mailchimp and QuickBooks admin access and API credentials
Review and sign off on data mapping before test load
openItems: Confirm HubSpot tier and seat count
Confirm whether historical invoices must be visible in CRM

approaches.name: Concurrent
approaches.description: All four systems implemented at once with a single cutover

approaches.name: Phased
approaches.description: CRM + migration first (Phase 1), then integrations + training (Phase 2), overlapping 2 weeks
dependencies: Phase 1 data quality assessment gates Phase 2 integration scope

recommendation: Phased approach: get CRM functional and contact data clean before layering QuickBooks and Aircall integrations, with a 2-week overlap to hold the 8-week timeline. The spreadsheet-to-CRM migration is the highest-risk item and should be de-risked first.
